CustomField.description: Penny's rolling composite skill score across all completed Skill Assessment records for this learner. Updated by ScoreAssessment Agentforce Action after each assessment completes. Penny reads in L3 coaching context: 'Your current skill score is 72/100 — up from 58 at program start.'
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Penny's rolling composite skill score across all completed Skill Assessment records for this learner. Updated by ScoreAssessment Agentforce Action after each assessment completes. Penny reads in L3 coaching context: 'Your current skill score is 72/100 — up from 58 at program start.'
CustomField.label: Penny Skill Score
